description: Static mock error template for Team 3 prompt testing and Team 2 Audio Manager playback.
schema_note: This file contains mock detected driving errors. related_metrics_granite refers to the shared telemetry field names expected by the Granite race engineer prompt builder.

errors.coaching_hint: Brake slightly earlier before Turn 1 and release the brake more smoothly to improve corner entry stability.

errors.message: Poor corner exit detected at Turn 3.
errors.coaching_hint: Apply throttle more progressively on corner exit to reduce wheel spin and improve acceleration.

errors.message: Significant time loss detected in Sector 2.
errors.coaching_hint: Focus on smoother braking and earlier throttle application through Sector 2 to reduce lap time loss.

errors.message: Unstable throttle control detected at Turn 5.
errors.coaching_hint: Use a smoother throttle input at Turn 5 to keep the car stable and avoid unnecessary wheel spin.

errors.message: The car appears to be off the ideal racing line at Turn 7.
errors.coaching_hint: Try to keep the car closer to the ideal racing line and avoid excessive steering correction.

errors.message: Overtake is not recommended at this moment.
errors.coaching_hint: The gap to the car ahead is still too large. Focus on improving corner exits before attempting an overtake.
